# Hydropark

Hydropark is a free desktop AI agent that runs 100% offline on your own machine
(Windows & macOS). It starts empty; you equip it with skills. Skills compose:
enable several and the app becomes the tool you need. Each skill costs $5 once and
is yours forever — no subscription, no account required.

Key facts:
- Offline / on-device: the model runs locally; no conversation data leaves the device.
- Free base app; skills are $5 each, one-time, perpetual.
- Skills compose — timers, lists, planners, unit switches, etc. — deduplicated and
  fit against a fixed on-device context budget (a meter refuses a skill that will not fit).
- You are NOT training or fine-tuning a model; the weights never change.

Links:
- Home: https://hydropark.app/
- Download (Windows & macOS): https://github.com/xamcross/hydropark-gym/releases
- Privacy: https://hydropark.app/privacy
- Terms (offline-forever commitment): https://hydropark.app/terms
